subject: feat(pwa): add update banner and fix manifest config
body:
The PWA was configured with registerType: 'prompt' but had no UI to
show updates or let users apply them. Users on cached service worker
versions had no way to get new code.

- Add usePWAUpdate hook wrapping virtual:pwa-register/react
- Add UpdateBanner component (fixed bottom banner with "Update" button)
- Add beforeinstallprompt capture script to index.html (prevents losing
  install prompt on repeat Chromium visits)
- Fix manifest icons: separate 'any' and 'maskable' purposes (combined
  "any maskable" causes browsers to pick the wrong icon)
- Add stable manifest id: '/' (prevents Chrome from deriving it from
  start_url)

Tags: pwa, ui, debug
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: pwa-system
Semver: minor
